Declaration Of Jennifer Munoz In Support Of Crc 3.1800(A)(2)
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for Prove- Up for a Request for Default Judgment against Defendant Donald Perez and Defendant DWPCO.

Dept.505: Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Jones and Deputy Belen; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:12:10 a.m and concluding at 9:43:00 a.m. (D505)

Jason Lundberg, Esq. representing Plaintiffs Ramon Munoz and Jennifer Munoz.
Plaintiff Ramon Munoz was placed under oath and testified.
Plaintiff Jennifer Munoz was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Donald Perez and Defendant DWPCO not appearing.

Complaint filed Feb-14-2020.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Donald Perez filed Mar-10-2020.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant DWPCO filed Mar-13-2020.
Default entered as to Defendant Donald Perez and Defendant DWPCO on Jul-17-2020.
Notice of Motion for request for default judgment filed Jan-13-2025.

Counsel provides a summary to the court.
Plaintiff Ramon is examined and testifies.
Plantiff Jennifer is examined and testifies.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants:

Damages $2,518,483.40
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
Other $0
Total Judgment $2,518,483.40

Proposed judgment as amended is signed and filed by the Court.
